title: Copper catalysts for the preparation of ethylene glycol
abstract: CuO-ZrO 2 catalysts may be prepared by a process which includes contacting a solution of a copper salt and a zirconyl salt with a solution of an alkali hydroxide to form a reaction mixture, wherein the contacting produces a precipitate; maintaining the reaction mixture at a temperature of about 0 Â°C to about 60 Â°C and at a pH of about 6 to about 12; filtering the reaction mixture to collect the precipitate; drying the precipitate at about 75 Â°C to about 150 Â°C; and calcining the precipitate at about 300 Â°C to about 800 Â°C. The CuO-ZrO 2 catalysts are useful for the hydrogenation of dimethyl oxalate to prepare ethylene glycol.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst prepared by a process comprising: contacting a solution of a copper salt and a zirconyl salt with a solution of an alkali hydroxide to form a reaction mixture, wherein the contacting produces a precipitate; maintaining the reaction mixture at a temperature of about 0 Â°C to about 60 Â°C and at a pH of about 6 to about 12; filtering the reaction mixture to collect the precipitate; drying the precipitate at about 75 Â°C to about 150 Â°C; and calcining the precipitate at about 300 Â°C to about 800 Â°C. 2. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of claim 1, wherein the copper salt comprises copper nitrate. 3. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of any of claims 1-2, wherein the zirconyl salt comprises zirconyl oxynitrate. 4. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of claim 1, wherein the copper salt comprises copper nitrate and the zirconyl salt comprises zirconyl oxynitrate. 5. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of any of claims 1-4, wherein the alkali hydroxide comprises sodium hydroxide and/or potassium hydroxide. 6. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of claim 5, wherein the alkali hydroxide comprises sodium hydroxide. 7. The CuO-Zr0 2 catalyst of any of claims 1-12, wherein the precipitate is calcined at about 500 Â°C. 14.
